frame: Blender Z-up world coordinates (identity from .ply native — verified)

files.note: Both files share the exact same source frame. Load both with the same SceneMeshAlignment in dimos and they will co-register as they do in Blender. The original data/dimos_office/dimos_office.ply (with full Gaussian properties, used by SplatCameraModule for head-camera rendering) is in the same frame as well, since Blender's PLY importer applies no transform on import.
